gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders among dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and during the fair, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.
At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

Within the area, students clutch resumes inside branded folders among dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.
Additionally, alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and during the fair, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.
At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

Within the area, students clutch resumes inside branded folders among dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.
Additionally, alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and during this time, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders among dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, students clutch resumes inside branded folders among dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station; students clutch resumes inside branded folders among dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.
